emails.subject: Meet w/ Belden
emails.body: Meet w/ Belden Kevin Instead of our weekly update meeting, would you like to meet with Belden at 4:00 in your office? RH

emails.subject: RE: Meet w/ Belden
emails.body: RE: Meet w/ Belden I need to leave at 3:30 today to go to my stepson's football game. Unfortunately, I have a 2:00 and 3:00 meeting already. Is this just a general catch-up discussion? To: Presto, Kevin M.

emails.subject: RE: Meet w/ Belden
emails.body: Yeah, general catch up no big deal. We can do it anytime. RH To: Herndon, Rogers

emails.subject: RE: Meet w/ Belden
emails.body: What time works for you guys? To: Presto, Kevin M.

emails.subject: RE: Meet w/ Belden
emails.body: I say we do it another time i am booked solid today. maybe we can catch him tomorrow. I will let you know. RH To: Herndon, Rogers
